name: Airtel Credit Card

Airtel recharges and bill payments via Airtel Thanks App
Utility bill payments via Airtel Thanks App

exclusions: purchases converted to EMI post facto
payment of card fees and other card charges
utility spends not done on Airtel Thanks App

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Amazon eVoucher worth ₹500 on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance

joiningBenefits: Amazon eVoucher worth ₹500 on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel purchases from ₹400 to ₹4,000, capped at ₹500 per statement cycle
additionalDetails: Cashback is directly credited to the credit card statement.
Zomato, Blinkit, and District Movies value-back is credited to the respective partner wallet, not as statement credit.
Minimum order value of ₹499 applies for Zomato and Blinkit value-back. Wallet loads and gift card purchases are excluded.

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India

internalNotes: Card details manually audited and verified by agent on 2026-06-25
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Cashback is credited directly to the credit card statement and not redeemed separately.
Effective 12 April 2026: Domestic lounge access (previously 4 visits/year with ₹50,000/3-month spend gate) has been discontinued.

Effective 12 April 2026: Swiggy and BigBasket cashback removed. Zomato and Blinkit (plus District Movies) value-back introduced at 10%, capped at ₹200 per partner per month, credited to partner wallet.
Effective 12 April 2026: Dynamic capping introduced for Airtel (25%) and utility (10%) cashback — capped at 2x and 1x base cashback respectively.

25% cashback on Airtel is applicable only for recharge or bill payment of active Airtel connections via Airtel Thanks App; payments for new or inactive connections, hardware cost, installation charges, advance recharge or similar amounts are not eligible.
Accelerated cashback each month is capped at twice the base cashback earned in the same statement month.
Preferred merchant cashback (Zomato, Blinkit, District Movies) is capped at ₹200 per partner per month, credited to respective partner wallets.
1% cashback on other eligible spends has no cap.
Cashback is earned basis merchant IDs / VPA IDs received from merchants, and disputes may take up to 90 days to reconcile.
Cashback is credited in the next billing cycle 3 days prior to the statement generation date.
Cashback on individual transactions is rounded down to the nearest rupee.
Minimum order value of ₹499 applies for Zomato and Blinkit value-back eligibility. Wallet loads and gift card purchases are excluded from the value-back offer.
